lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Which car was the winner in 1995?
lines.chinese: 哪辆车赢得了1995年的比赛？
lines.raw: Which car was the winner in 1995? | 哪辆车赢得了1995年的比赛？

lines.english: There is a car race near our town every year.
lines.chinese: 每年我们镇附近都有一场赛车比赛。
lines.raw: There is a car race near our town every year. | 每年我们镇附近都有一场赛车比赛。

lines.english: In 1995, there was a very big race.
lines.chinese: 1995年，那里举行了一场非常盛大的比赛。
lines.raw: In 1995, there was a very big race. | 1995年，那里举行了一场非常盛大的比赛。

lines.english: There were hundreds of people there.
lines.raw: There were hundreds of people there. | 那里有数百人。

lines.english: My wife and I were at the race.
lines.raw: My wife and I were at the race. | 我妻子和我在赛场。

lines.english: Our friends Julie and Jack were there, too.
lines.chinese: 我们的朋友朱莉和杰克也在那里。
lines.raw: Our friends Julie and Jack were there, too. | 我们的朋友朱莉和杰克也在那里。

lines.english: You can see us in the crowd.
lines.chinese: 你可以在人群中看到我们。
lines.raw: You can see us in the crowd. | 你可以在人群中看到我们。

lines.english: We are standing on the left.
lines.raw: We are standing on the left. | 我们站在左边。

lines.english: There were twenty cars in the race.
lines.raw: There were twenty cars in the race. | 比赛中有二十辆车。

lines.english: There were English cars, French cars, German cars, Italian cars, American cars and Japanese cars.
lines.chinese: 有英国车、法国车、德国车、意大利车、美国车和日本车。
lines.raw: There were English cars, French cars, German cars, Italian cars, American cars and Japanese cars. | 有英国车、法国车、德国车、意大利车、美国车和日本车。

lines.chinese: 那是一个激动人心的结局。
lines.raw: It was an exciting finish. | 那是一个激动人心的结局。

lines.chinese: 获胜者是比利·斯图尔特。
lines.raw: The winner was Billy Stewart. | 获胜者是比利·斯图尔特。

lines.english: He was in car number fifteen.
lines.raw: He was in car number fifteen. | 他在15号车里。

lines.english: Five other cars were just behind him.
lines.raw: Five other cars were just behind him. | 其他五辆车紧随其后。

lines.english: On the way home, my wife said to me, 'Don't drive so quickly!
lines.chinese: 在回家的路上，我妻子对我说：“别开那么快！
lines.raw: On the way home, my wife said to me, 'Don't drive so quickly! | 在回家的路上，我妻子对我说：“别开那么快！

lines.chinese: 你又不是比利·斯图尔特！”
lines.raw: You're not Billy Stewart!' | 你又不是比利·斯图尔特！”
